notes: Strong regulatory surface work (CPG 220, CCCFA, BS11) and disciplined out-of-scope section, but MVP scope partially fails by deferring the FMA prescribed fairness methodology confirmation and independent validation requirement (2023 MRM policy) rather than naming them as required in-scope items, and assumptions section flags CPG 220 CRO path but misses the FMA plain-language explainability standard and the 2023 MRM policy independent validation gap as distinct critical uncertainties.
